parameters.query:
WITH RecentMachineData AS (
    SELECT
        md.machine_data_id,
        md.retroid_id,
        -- md.procedure_detail_id, -- 既然条件已经是 '81'，这里没必要取出来占用内存
        md.data,
        md.createtime,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY md.retroid_id ORDER BY md.createtime DESC) as rn
    FROM
        mes.machine_data md
    WHERE
        md.procedure_detail_id = '81'
        -- 【已修复】查询范围：大于等于今天零点，小于明天零点（即今天全天）
        AND md.createtime >= CURRENT_DATE
        AND md.createtime < CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day' 
)
SELECT DISTINCT
    j.joborder_number,
    r.retroid,
    pi.product_code,
    rmd.createtime
FROM
    mes.retroid r
JOIN
    RecentMachineData rmd ON r.retroid_id = rmd.retroid_id AND rmd.rn = 1
JOIN 
    mes.joborder j ON (rmd.data->>'jobNumber') = j.joborder_number
JOIN
    mes.product_info pi ON j.product_id = pi.product_id
WHERE
    j.status = '1' 
    AND j.joborder_type = 'PACK'
    AND r.status IN ('1','2');
